name: Cinnamon Plum Tart
recipeInstructions: This is a famous Scottish tart. If you use the small purple plums, increase the number to 12. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Arrange the plums in the pie shell, skin side up. In a bowl, beat together the cream, eggs, egg yolk, lemon juice, granulated sugar, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon. Pour over the plums. Bake for 25 minutes or until the plums are softened. Mix together the brown sugar and the remaining 1 teaspoon cinnamon. Sprinkle over the tart. Return to the oven and bake for a further 10 minutes or until crusty. Serve warm. SERVES: 6
